trade.summary: Arabia Saudita is one of Cina's largest energy suppliers and a major trade partner. Cina imports Saudi crude oil (largest volume supplier). Cina exports electronics, machinery, vehicles, and consumer goods. Cina is Arabia Saudita's largest trading partner, with bilateral trade deepening under Vision 2030 industrialization.
disputes: Saudi-Stati Uniti alliance means alignment constraints on Saudi-Cina deepening
Competition between Chinese and Western tech for Saudi 5G and digital projects

diplomatic.summary: A landmark strategic relationship deepened by Cina's brokering of the Saudi-Iran normalization agreement (March 2023). President Xi visited Riyadh (December 2022) and secured extensive cooperation agreements. Arabia Saudita is engaging Cina as a counterbalance to Stati Uniti pressure on human rights and regional issues. Both coordinate in OPEC+ and other forums. Arabia Saudita values Cina's non-interference principle.
recent_incidents: Arabia Saudita announced interest in Yuan-denominated oil settlements
Arabia Saudita applied to join BRICS (2023, accepted for 2024)

military.summary: No formal military alliance—Arabia Saudita's security partnership with the Stati Uniti remains primary. However, Cina has sold ballistic missiles and military drones to Arabia Saudita. Arabia Saudita is acquiring Chinese military technology in parallel to Stati Uniti arms. Joint military cooperation is growing but limited by the Saudi-Stati Uniti security relationship.
incidents: China supplied DF-3 ballistic missiles to Saudi Arabia (1988)
China sold CH-4 armed drones and Wing Loong UAVs to Saudi Arabia
China reportedly assisted Saudi Arabia in building ballistic missile production facility

financial.summary: Arabia Saudita's PIF sovereign wealth fund is increasing Chinese investments. Saudi Aramco has Chinese joint ventures. Cina's state banks provide project financing for Vision 2030 projects. Arabia Saudita is considering RMB-denominated oil trade, though decision pending. Bilateral financial ties expanding rapidly.

energy.summary: Energy is the central pillar of the relationship. Arabia Saudita is Cina's largest or second-largest crude oil supplier. Cina is Arabia Saudita's largest oil customer, accounting for over 20% of Saudi exports. Saudi Aramco has signed long-term supply agreements and joint refining ventures in Cina. The relationship is deeply energy-driven.

scientific.summary: Growing scientific cooperation under Vision 2030. KAStati UnitiT has partnerships with Chinese universities. Cina provides technology for Saudi digital economy and smart city projects (Neom). Joint publications in energy and materials science increasing.
